---
title: "Chanwe Showcase: ggplot2 + gt"
subtitle: "Tables and plots aligned with chanwe-typst design tokens"
author: "Alejandro Abraham"
date: today
format:
  chanwe-typst:
    keep-typ: true
    number-sections: true
    section-numbering: "1.1.1"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    dev: svglite
    out.width: "100%"
chanwe:
  document: "CHW · DEV"
  edition: "SHOWCASE / 2026"
  volume: "MENDOZA · ARGENTINA"
  chapter: "Design System"
  section: "R Package"
  topic: "chanwer"
  rail-eyebrow: "VISUAL REFERENCE"
  hero-image: "_extensions/chanwe/assets/bg_mountains.jpg"
  cover: true
  toc: true
  toc-eyebrow: "Document map"
  toc-title: "Contents"
  toc-lede: "This document showcases all ggplot2 and gt table variants produced by the chanwer R package — 22 figures and 8 tables — styled with the chanwe-typst design tokens: Satoshi body, Archivo Black headings, primary orange #FB3D0E, and the 8-color editorial chart palette."
  page-bg: "FBFBFB"  
  abstract-eyebrow: "TLDR;"
  abstract-title: "Visual Reference"
  abstract-takeaway: "chanwer themes are fully aligned with chanwe-typst: same tokens, same fonts, same 8-color editorial palette."
  abstract-text: "This showcase covers every theme variant in the chanwer package — scatter, bar, line, area, distribution, heatmap, faceted, and error-bar figures; gt tables in spacious and compact densities across both background options. All outputs use the typst design tokens directly, ensuring visual consistency between R-generated figures and the surrounding Typst document."
  abstract-status: "Stable · Internal"
  abstract-show:
    - document
    - edition
    - author
    - status
  meta-rows:
    - { label: "Package",  value: "chanwer",          sub: "R design system" }
    - { label: "Section",  value: "Design Tokens",    sub: "chanwe-typst aligned" }
    - { label: "Author",   value: "Chanwe",            sub: "Alejandro Abraham" }
  back-cover: true
  back-cover-tagline-1: "Estrategia Activa,"
  back-cover-tagline-2: "Codo a codo."
  back-cover-cols:
    - { label: "Address",  value: "Via Montenapoleone, 27", sub: "Mendoza · Argentina" }
    - { label: "Web",      value: "chanwe.com.ar",          sub: "contacto@chanwe.com.ar" }
    - { label: "Document", value: "CHW · DEV",              sub: "Showcase / 2026" }
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
devtools::load_all()
chanwe_load_fonts()

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(dev.args = list(bg = "transparent"))

mt <- tibble::as_tibble(mtcars, rownames = "model") |>
    mutate(
        cyl = factor(cyl),
        gear = factor(gear),
        am = factor(am, labels = c("Automatic", "Manual")),
        hp_band = cut(
            hp,
            breaks = c(-Inf, 110, 180, Inf),
            labels = c("Low", "Mid", "High")
        )
    )

fmt_fleet <- list(
    mpg = \(x) formatC(x, digits = 2, format = "f"),
    hp = \(x) formatC(x, digits = 0, format = "d"),
    wt = \(x) formatC(x, digits = 2, format = "f")
)
```

# Complex

##### KPI

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
#| fig-height: 5
# 1. Encode the KPI data
kpi <- chanwe_kpi(
    num = "45,91",
    label = "USD MM",
    period = "05·MAY·2026",
    mtc1_num = "0,19%",
    mtc1_label = "WoW",
    mtc1_direction = "+",
    mtc2_num = "3,17%",
    mtc2_label = "MoM",
    mtc2_direction = "-",
    mtc3_num = "17,78%",
    mtc3_label = "YoY",
    mtc3_direction = "+"
)


# 2. Use it in labs()
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(bg_color = "white", plot_borders = TRUE) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "Simple fleet view",
            eyebrow = "TLDR;"
        ),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle("Faceted by transmission type"),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band"
    ) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "Reservas Internacionales",
            eyebrow = "BCRA · SECTOR EXTERNO"
        ),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle(
            "Evolución de reservas internacionales brutas (USD MM).",
            kpi = kpi
        )
    ) +
    theme_chanwe()
```


# kbl Tables

##### Ivory background

```{r}
mt |>
    select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
    slice_head(n = 8) |>
    chanwe_kbl(
        title = "bg · white-ivory",
        subtitle = "title_size · 16pt  ·  weight · regular  ·  density · spacious",
        eyebrow = "TABLE · SPACIOUS · WHITE-IVORY",
        caption = "Source · Motor Trend, 1974 · mtcars dataset.",
        stub = "model",
        bg = "white-ivory",
        fmt = fmt_fleet
    )
```


##### White background

```{r}
mt |>
    select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
    slice_head(n = 8) |>
    chanwe_kbl(
        title = "bg · white",
        subtitle = "title_size · 16pt  ·  weight · regular  ·  density · spacious",
        eyebrow = "TABLE · SPACIOUS · WHITE",
        caption = "Source · Motor Trend, 1974 · mtcars dataset.",
        stub = "model",
        bg = "white",
        fmt = fmt_fleet
    )
```

##### Beige background

```{r}
mt |>
    select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
    slice_head(n = 8) |>
    chanwe_kbl(
        title = "bg · beige",
        subtitle = "title_size · 16pt  ·  weight · regular  ·  density · spacious",
        eyebrow = "TABLE · SPACIOUS · BEIGE",
        caption = "Source · Motor Trend, 1974 · mtcars dataset.",
        stub = "model",
        bg = "beige",
        top_border = FALSE,
        fmt = fmt_fleet
    )
```

##### Gray background

```{r}
mt |>
    select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
    slice_head(n = 8) |>
    chanwe_kbl(
        title = "bg · gray",
        subtitle = "title_size · 16pt  ·  weight · regular  ·  density · spacious",
        eyebrow = "TABLE · SPACIOUS · GRAY",
        caption = "Source · Motor Trend, 1974 · mtcars dataset.",
        stub = "model",
        bg = "gray",
        padding = 0,
        top_border = FALSE,
        fmt = fmt_fleet
    )
```

##### Metallic background

```{r}
mt |>
    select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
    slice_head(n = 8) |>
    chanwe_kbl(
        title = "bg · metallic  ·  default",
        subtitle = "title_size · 16pt  ·  weight · regular  ·  density · spacious",
        eyebrow = "TABLE · SPACIOUS · METALLIC · DEFAULT",
        caption = "Source · Motor Trend, 1974 · mtcars dataset.",
        stub = "model",
        bg = "metallic",
        fmt = fmt_fleet
    )
```


# Plots

##### Plot 1

::: {.inset-great-figure eyebrow="FY 2025" title="Revenue by Segment" layout="left" position="right" color="beige" source="Data: FY 2025 — valores normalizados"}
La categoria C presenta el valor mas alto del conjunto. Los segmentos A y E muestran rendimiento dentro del rango esperado, mientras que F establece el piso de referencia para el analisis diferencial.


```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    facet_wrap(~am) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(bg_color = "beige", plot_padding = 18) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "bg_color · beige",
            eyebrow = "PLOT · BACKGROUND VARIANTS"
        ),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle("title · Archivo 400  ·  padding · 18pt"),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band",
        caption = chanwe_caption("Source: Motor Trend, 1974")
    )
```

:::

##### Plot 2

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(bg_color = "ivory") +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "bg_color · ivory",
            eyebrow = "PLOT · BACKGROUND VARIANTS"
        ),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle("title · Archivo 400"),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band"
    )
```

##### Plot 3

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(bg_color = "gray", plot_borders = TRUE) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "bg_color · gray  ·  plot_borders · TRUE",
            eyebrow = "PLOT · BACKGROUND VARIANTS"
        ),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle("title · Archivo 400"),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band"
    )
```


##### Plot 4

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(bg_color = "white", plot_borders = TRUE) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "bg_color · white  ·  plot_borders · TRUE",
            eyebrow = "PLOT · BACKGROUND VARIANTS"
        ),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle("title · Archivo 400"),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band"
    )
```

##### Plot 5 · Metallic

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(bg_color = "metallic") +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "bg_color · metallic  ·  default",
            eyebrow = "PLOT · BACKGROUND VARIANTS"
        ),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle("title · Archivo 400  ·  bg default"),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band",
        caption = chanwe_caption("Source: Motor Trend, 1974")
    )
```


# Highlight


:::: {.zone-highlight color="metallic" above="-2"}

```{r}
#| label: fig-scatter-complejo
#| fig-height: 5
library(dplyr)

mt <- tibble::as_tibble(mtcars, rownames = "model") |>
    mutate(
        cyl = factor(cyl),
        gear = factor(gear),
        am = factor(am, labels = c("Automatic", "Manual")),
        hp_band = cut(
            hp,
            breaks = c(-Inf, 110, 180, Inf),
            labels = c("Low", "Mid", "High")
        )
    )

kpi <- chanwe_kpi(
    num = "45,91",
    label = "USD MM",
    period = "05·MAY·2026",
    mtc1_num = "0,19%",
    mtc1_label = "WoW",
    mtc1_direction = "+",
    mtc2_num = "3,17%",
    mtc2_label = "MoM",
    mtc2_direction = "-",
    mtc3_num = "17,78%",
    mtc3_label = "YoY",
    mtc3_direction = "+"
)


# 2. Use it in labs()
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(bg_color = "transparent", plot_borders = FALSE) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "Simple fleet view",
            eyebrow = "TLDR;"
        ),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle("Faceted by transmission type"),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band"
    ) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "Reservas Internacionales",
            eyebrow = "BCRA · SECTOR EXTERNO"
        ),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle(
            "Evolución de reservas internacionales brutas (USD MM).",
            kpi = kpi
        )
    ) +
    theme_chanwe()
```

::::

# Compact title

##### Plot · compact_title TRUE (default)

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(compact_title = TRUE) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title("Compact title · default", eyebrow = "COMPACT"),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle("gap_ln · 6pt  ·  compact_title = TRUE"),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band",
        caption = chanwe_caption("Source: Motor Trend, 1974")
    )
```

##### Plot · compact_title FALSE

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(compact_title = FALSE) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title("Spacious title", eyebrow = "SPACIOUS"),
        subtitle = chanwe_subtitle("gap_ln · 14pt  ·  compact_title = FALSE"),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band",
        caption = chanwe_caption("Source: Motor Trend, 1974")
    )
```

# No subtitle

##### Plot · title only

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(has_subtitle = FALSE) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "title only · no subtitle",
            eyebrow = "COMPACT HERO"
        ),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band",
        caption = chanwe_caption("Source: Motor Trend, 1974")
    )
```

##### Plot · title only · zone-highlight

:::: {.zone-highlight color="metallic" above="-2"}

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(has_subtitle = FALSE) +
    labs(
        title = chanwe_title(
            "title only · zone-highlight",
            eyebrow = "COMPACT HERO"
        ),
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band",
        caption = chanwe_caption("Source: Motor Trend, 1974")
    )
```

::::

##### Plot · no title · no subtitle

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe() +
    labs(
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band",
        caption = chanwe_caption("Source: Motor Trend, 1974")
    )
```

##### Plot · no title · no subtitle · zone-highlight

:::: {.zone-highlight color="metallic" above="-2"}

```{r}
#| dev.args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
ggplot(mt, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp_band)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.88) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_chanwe_d() +
    theme_chanwe(bg_color = "transparent") +
    labs(
        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
        y = "Miles per gallon",
        color = "HP band",
        caption = chanwe_caption("Source: Motor Trend, 1974")
    )
```

::::

##### Table · title only

```{r}
mt |>
    select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
    slice_head(n = 8) |>
    chanwe_kbl(
        title = "title only · no subtitle",
        eyebrow = "TABLE · COMPACT HERO",
        caption = "Source · Motor Trend, 1974 · mtcars dataset.",
        stub = "model",
        bg = "metallic",
        fmt = fmt_fleet
    )
```

##### Table · title only · zone-highlight

:::: {.zone-highlight color="metallic" above="-2"}

```{r}
mt |>
    select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
    slice_head(n = 8) |>
    chanwe_kbl(
        title = "title only · zone-highlight",
        eyebrow = "TABLE · COMPACT HERO",
        caption = "Source · Motor Trend, 1974 · mtcars dataset.",
        stub = "model",
        bg = "transparent",
        fmt = fmt_fleet
    )
```

::::

##### Table · no title · no subtitle

```{r}
mt |>
    select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
    slice_head(n = 8) |>
    chanwe_kbl(
        caption = "Source · Motor Trend, 1974 · mtcars dataset.",
        stub = "model",
        bg = "metallic",
        fmt = fmt_fleet
    )
```

##### Table · no title · no subtitle · zone-highlight

:::: {.zone-highlight color="metallic" above="-2"}

```{r}
mt |>
    select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
    slice_head(n = 8) |>
    chanwe_kbl(
        caption = "Source · Motor Trend, 1974 · mtcars dataset.",
        stub = "model",
        bg = "transparent",
        fmt = fmt_fleet
    )
```

::::
